business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management group with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas, headquartered in Austin.

coverages_discussed.notes: Workers' Compensation coverage is requested for approximately 285 employees across all operations.
Commercial General Liability requested with occurrence limits of $1,000,000 per occurrence and $2,000,000 general aggregate.
Commercial Property coverage requested for all scheduled locations on a special form with replacement cost valuation.
coverages_discussed.requested_limit: Special form with replacement cost valuation

document_info.prepared_by: Marcus Jennings, Senior Vice President, Capitol Insurance Advisors

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative:
The claims history warrants review; management has implemented corrective measures to address identified exposures. Over the review period, the insured has incurred 38 total claims with $511,891.20 in total paid losses and $714,517.96 total incurred. Currently, 11 claims remain open and 27 have been closed.

Annualized loss ratio is 21.6% (avg annual incurred $142,903.59 against current annual premium $660,422.75 over 5 loss years).

Breakdown by coverage line:
• Workers' Compensation: 28 claims, $324,545.30 paid, $415,934.50 incurred
• General Liability: 8 claims, $8,779.76 paid, $82,656.15 incurred
• Commercial Property: 2 claims, $178,566.14 paid, $215,927.31 incurred

Note: account experienced a cancellation in 2022-2023 with Zurich Insurance Group. Reason: Insured cancelled — moved to current carrier.
extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: We are pleased to submit Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC for your review and consideration. The insured is a boutique hotel ownership and management group with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas, headquartered in Austin, with approximately 16 years of operating history. Coverage is requested for Workers' Compensation, General Liability, Commercial Property.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: The insured is a boutique hotel ownership and management group with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas, headquartered in Austin.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: The insured carries contractual risk transfer provisions in all subcontractor and vendor agreements. An employee assistance program and workplace wellness initiative have been in place for over five years. A comprehensive fleet management program with GPS tracking and driver training has been in place since 2023. The insured maintains a dedicated safety committee that meets monthly and conducts quarterly site audits. The insured has implemented a formal return-to-work program that has reduced lost-time claims by over 30%. Favorable experience modification factor of 0.94, reflecting a strong loss control program relative to class peers. With 285 employees and a structured HR program, the insured maintains low turnover and consistent safety training.

concerns: Claims history warrants review: 38 total claims with 511891.20 paid and 714517.96 incurred; 11 claims remain open.
Account experienced a cancellation in 2022-2023 with Zurich Insurance Group; reason noted as insured cancelled and moved to current carrier.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Over the review period, the insured incurred 38 total claims with 511891.20 in total paid losses and 714517.96 total incurred.
